name: Boundless Playspace and Activity Center
description: Boundless Playspace and Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 4 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Chip Shots
description: Chip Shots is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and lights.
fees: Fee required — Open Play sessions will have a small fee associated to take care of the court rentals.

name: Cook Park
description: Cook Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Elmcroft Park
description: Elmcroft Park is a place to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The court is free.

name: Goose Egg Park
description: Come play pickleball at Goose Egg Park in Rochester, MN! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Next Step Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Next Step Pickleball in Byron, MN! There are 2 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, and a pro shop or equipment store. The courts are private.

name: Pickle Shed
description: Pickle Shed is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oronoco, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water. The courts are private.

name: RCTC Field House
description: RCTC Field House is a place to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 5 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: Rochester Athletic Club
description: Rochester Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 12 asphalt courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $5.41 per player for indoor, $0 for outdoor

name: Rochester Eagles Club
description: Come play pickleball at Rochester Eagles Club in Rochester, MN! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Rochester Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Rochester Pickleball in Rochester, MN! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Slatterly Park
description: Slatterly Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rochester, MN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
